ValidationRule.description: QI Status cannot be set to FM QI Review (Red Hold) without QI_Submitted__c = true.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( QI_Status__c = "FM QI Review (Red Hold)", NOT(QI_Submitted__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A QI Inspection must be submitted before placing a Work Order in FM QI Review (Red Hold). Complete and submit the QI Inspection from the QI Inspection record, then update the status.
